next_steps: Endobronchial ultrasound-guided transbronchial needle aspiration (EBUS-TBNA) of mediastinal lymph nodes
Serum ACE level, 1,25-dihydroxyvitamin D, and 24-hour urine calcium
18F-FDG PET/CT to evaluate for systemic involvement and guide biopsy site
Cardiac MRI to rule out cardiac sarcoidosis given history of syncope and palpitations
Excisional biopsy of peripheral node if accessible or persistent nodule if bronchial biopsy is nondiagnostic
Endobronchial ultrasound-guided transbronchial needle aspiration (EBUS-TBNA) of mediastinal lymph nodes
Cardiac MRI with late gadolinium enhancement
Serum ACE level, 1,25-dihydroxyvitamin D, and 24-hour urine calcium
Continuous cardiac rhythm monitoring (Holter or event monitor)
